description: Configure the global system message in JFrog Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, admin/password) to broadcast an upcoming maintenance window. Set the message to "Scheduled Maintenance: Saturday, Oct 24th at 02:00 UTC. System will be read-only." with a severity level of Warn (Orange). Ensure the system message is enabled and visible across the platform.

metadata.expected_message: Scheduled Maintenance: Saturday, Oct 24th at 02:00 UTC. System will be read-only.
